evals.name: full-conversion-test
evals.prompt:
Convert the following Zenn article content to Dev.to markdown. Make sure to handle the front matter, embeds, and messages correctly. Content:
---
title: 'Zenn to Dev.to Test'
emoji: '🚀'
type: 'tech'
topics: ['nextjs', 'typescript']
published: true
---
# Getting Started

Welcome to our test article.

:::message
This is a test message.
:::

@[youtube](dQw4w9WgXcQ)

```typescript:hello.ts
console.log('Hello');
```
evals.expected_output: Dev.to compatible markdown with Jekyll front matter, Liquid tags for YouTube, and blockquote for message.
assertions: Contains Jekyll front matter with title, published, tags (nextjs, typescript)
First heading in body is ## Getting Started
Code block is ```typescript without filename, filename is a comment

evals.name: math-and-details-test
evals.prompt:
Optimize this Zenn snippet for Dev.to. It contains math and details blocks. Content:

$$ e = mc^2 $$

:::details Mathematical proof
Proof here...
:::

$1 + 1 = 2$
evals.expected_output: Markdown with {% katex %} blocks and <details> HTML tags.
